hero.headline: When Valdosta's pipes *quit working*, we get them working
hero.subheadline: Three generations of plumbers who show up when we say we will.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every pipe, drain, and fixture
services_section.subheading: From kitchen sinks to sewer lines — we handle it all

services.title: Drain Cleaning
services.description: Pressure jetting and snaking to clear even the toughest blockages. We dig deep to find what's really causing the backup.

services.title: Sewer Line Repair
services.description: Complete sewer line diagnostics and repair for residential and rental properties. From clogs to complete line replacement.

services.title: Water Heater Service
services.description: Installation, repair, and maintenance on all water heater types. When it quits heating, we get it running.

services.title: Well Pump Repair
services.description: Full well system service including pump repair and pressure switch replacement. We keep your water flowing.

about.heading: Three generations, one phone call
about.body: Mike Nelms runs this family plumbing operation with his sons. When Valdosta calls, we answer.

reviews.name: Beth D.
reviews.text: Went to school with Mike and his wife Lori — always liked them. Not surprised they have a successful business. Their sons came to work on our rental property's sewer.

reviews.name: Dan M.
reviews.text: Scheduled them to pressure jet my kitchen drain. Spent two and a half hours getting the blockage cleared — it was way up in the plumbing, but they got it done.

reviews.name: Brenda H.
reviews.text: Mike gives an honest opinion, works hard to solve the problem, and tries to take care of his customers. A+ to him and his company!

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving South Georgia
service_areas.subheading: Local team covering Valdosta and surrounding communities

cta.heading: Ready to fix what's broken?
cta.body: Call now for honest pricing and straight answers. Three generations of Valdosta plumbers ready to help.
